summary: Legal-tech startup Lawyered raised $2.5 million in a pre‑Series A round co‑led by Rainmatter and Turbostart, with participation from Finvolve, to expand its AI‑driven roadside legal assistance platform.

investors: All In Capital | Anurag Prasad | Harish Varadarajan | Harpreet Grover | Rinshul Chandra | TDV Partners
summary: Acai Theory, a health-focused QSR brand, raised Rs 4 crore in a pre‑seed round co‑led by All In Capital and TDV Partners, with participation from several angel investors, to fund expansion, team building and supply‑chain improvements.
Clarity Labs, a personal care D2C brand, raised over Rs 4 crore in a seed round led by Artha Venture Fund II to expand product development and omnichannel distribution.
Axten Hospitals raised Rs 2.5 crore in a seed round led by PedalStart to fund the launch of new surgical facilities and a patient‑care technology platform.

investors: InfoEdge Ventures | Kae Capital | Susquehanna Venture Capital
summary: GobbleCube, an AI-driven brand analytics platform, raised $15 million in a Series A round led by Susquehanna Venture Capital.

investors: Amit Damani | ISV Capital | OTP Ventures | Rohit Kapoor | Sadev Ventures
summary: FIFTH SENSE, a premium D2C fragrance brand, raised Rs 6.3 crore in a pre‑seed round led by OTP Ventures with participation from several other investors.

investors: ITI Growth Opportunities Fund | Merisis Wealth Trust | PROMAFT Partners | V3 Ventures
summary: The Hosteller raised Rs 150 crore in a Series B round led by PROMAFT Partners and V3 Ventures, with participation from ITI Growth Opportunities Fund and Merisis Wealth Trust, to expand its hostel network across India.

TraqCheck, an HR tech startup, raised $8 million in a Series A round led by IvyCap Ventures with participation from IIFL Fintech Fund to expand its AI-driven background screening and sourcing agents in Europe.

Pluckk, a digital-first fresh food and clean-label FMCG brand, raised Rs 100 crore in a Series A1 round led by Euro Gulf Investment to expand offline retail, international markets, and AI-driven supply chain capabilities.

investors: AdvantEdge Founders | Asian Development Bank | IvyCap Ventures | Trucks Venture Capital
summary: Astranova Mobility raised Rs 60 crore in a Series A round to expand its EV financing and asset management platform, with IvyCap Ventures leading the round and participation from Asian Development Bank, AdvantEdge Founders, and Trucks Venture Capital.

Atlas, a Singapore-based startup building an AI platform for independent accounting firms, raised $6 million in a seed round co-led by Accel and Stellaris to expand in North America and enhance its product.
IndiGo Ventures Fund invested about Rs 10 crore in air‑taxi startup Sarla Aviation, which develops eVTOL aircraft, to support its operating and expansion needs.
Bijak raised a $20 million Series B round in January 2022, led by Peak XV and Omidyar Network, valuing the B2B agri‑commodities marketplace at about $163 million.
Real-estate focused business services platform SILA raised $100 million from global private equity firm Permira to support its expansion and technology capabilities across India.
